methodology: Audit 25 MERGED DOMEX lanes (S460-S468). Classify each lane's EAD predictions as CONFIRMED, FALSIFIED, or PARTIAL. 21 lanes classifiable (4 INCOMPLETE: no EAD fields). 68 total predictions across classifiable lanes.
expect: Discovery ratio 54:1 is inflated by soft confirmations. Audit 20 DOMEX lanes: predict >=5 are misclassified (PARTIAL called CONFIRMED). Corrected ratio <=30:1. Falsified if <3 misclassifications found or corrected ratio >40:1.
actual: Discovery ratio 9.2:1 (46 confirmed : 5 falsified) across 68 predictions in 21 DOMEX lanes. 13 PARTIAL predictions (19.1%) uncounted by either side. 4 soft confirmations (26.7% of CONFIRMED-labeled lanes). Lane falsification rate 14.3% (3/21). The 54:1 baseline is a methodological artifact from including non-experimental L2 lessons in the numerator — DOMEX lanes with mandatory EAD fields produce falsifications at a healthy rate.
diff: Predicted >=5 misclassified: GOT 4 (close but below). Predicted corrected ratio <=30:1: CONFIRMED at 9.2:1 (much healthier than predicted). Mechanism PARTIALLY WRONG: primary driver is baseline contamination (non-experimental lessons in numerator), not soft confirmations. Soft confirmations exist (4 lanes) but account for ~4 predictions, not the 45-point gap between 54:1 and 9.2:1.

falsified_lanes.type: MIXED — P drought FALSIFIED, historian distribution 10x exceeded

soft_confirmations.issue: Second prediction (M4 activation >=25%) untested but labeled CONFIRMED
Got passive display not auto-fix, but labeled CONFIRMED
Direction CONFIRMED but S189 magnitude was 7x methodological artifact
CONFIRMED but K:P improvement was negligible (4.52->4.48)

key_findings: F-SWARMER1 discovery ratio baseline (54:1) is a methodological artifact — DOMEX-specific ratio is 9.2:1
PARTIAL predictions (19.1%) carry the most information but are uncounted by confirmation/falsification binary
Lane falsification rate 14.3% is below 20% adversarial target but well above implied 1.8% from 54:1
Soft confirmations (26.7% of labeled lanes) suggest CONFIRMED label is applied too liberally — threshold for 'confirmed' needs tightening
Tool-building predictions (did X get built?) inflate confirmation count — they're almost always true
prescriptions: Recalculate F-SWARMER1 discovery ratio using only DOMEX lane predictions, not all lessons
Add PARTIAL as a third EAD outcome category in close_lane.py (currently forces CONFIRMED or FALSIFIED binary)
Tighten CONFIRMED label: require ALL sub-predictions met, not just majority
Separate predictions into TYPE categories: tool-building (high prior), mechanism (medium prior), magnitude (low prior)

colony_baseline_update.status: Already below 30:1 target — baseline measurement was wrong, not the science quality
colony_baseline_update.implication: Colony should set new target at <=5:1 or switch to lane falsification rate >=20%
